hero.title: The Future of Learning
hero.subtitle: Experience education reimagined. Live classes, interactive courses, and personalized learning paths that adapt to your pace.

liveClasses.title: Live Classes
liveClasses.description: Join real-time video sessions with expert instructors. Interact, ask questions, and learn collaboratively.

courses.title: Video Lessons
courses.description: Access high-quality video content with downloadable resources, PDFs, and interactive materials.

quizzes.title: Interactive Quizzes
quizzes.description: Test your knowledge with engaging quizzes and get instant feedback on your progress.

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.description: Earn verified certificates upon course completion to showcase your skills.

progress.title: Progress Tracking
progress.description: Visual dashboards and analytics to track your learning journey in real-time.

mobile.title: Mobile Learning
mobile.description: Learn anywhere, anytime with our fully responsive platform available on all devices.

items.name: Sarah Ahmed
items.content: EduVerse transformed my learning experience. The live classes and interactive quizzes helped me ace my exams.

items.name: Mohammed Ali
items.content: The flexibility to learn at my own pace while working full-time has been game-changing. Highly recommended!

items.name: Emma Wilson
items.content: The course quality is exceptional. I've learned more here than in my entire university degree.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Journey?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of learners already transforming their future with Jannah Children.

footer.description: Revolutionizing education through technology. Learn without limits.
